text_excerpt: Contact | Saqib Bhatti Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Saqib Bhatti News My Plan In Parliament Contact A&E for Solihull Chadwick End Speeding Survey Digital ID Survey Meriden and Solihull East Planning Survey Meriden and Solihull East local Issues Survey Contact Leave this field blank Local Office 631 Warwick Road, Solihull, B91 1AR 0121 711 7029 [email protected] Saqib Bhatti on Facebook Saqib Bhatti on Twitter When writing to me by letter or email please always include your full name and home address including postcode. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
